subcodes.first_line: The mighty words, adorned with the mention of the Lord of Lords, were beheld, and from them wafted the breezes of Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمات محکمه که بذکر رب الارباب مزین بود مشاهده شد و نسمات فردوس از آن
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @rejection, opposition and persecution
